summary: Decent audience recording with clearer high end but hampered by the venue's acoustics
review: The tape is an audience (AUD) source that sounds slightly less distant and offers a clearer high‑end than many other recordings from this venue. However reviewers note the hall’s acoustics still limit overall fidelity, making it only a fair listen. No specific musical performance details were mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rated review; the show itself isn’t described, so rating relies mainly on the recording’s modest quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Slightly less distant sound and clearer high end compared to other AUDs, but overall suffers from poor venue acoustics.
